decisions.title: Dumb LOOP, Spawn-Owned Transition Actuation
decisions.statement: LOOP remains a dumb packet lifecycle shell; spawn owns signal normalization, transition validation, reconciliation, and actuation between local FSM state and GitHub projection.

decisions.title: systemd.path as Local Raw Signal Substrate
decisions.statement: Local artifact raw signals are detected via systemd .path units scoped to $wt and bridged to spawn through oneshot services.

resolved_topics: LOOP remains a dumb packet lifecycle shell.
spawn is the transition authority for local FSM reconciliation and actuation.
GitHub issue labels are the authoritative coarse remote state carrier.
Local artifact raw signals enter through systemd.path on $wt.
Direct API wrapper + systemd oneshot/transient units are the selected signaling/actuation pattern.

design_points: Define whether plan slice identity lives in one issue per slice or in project item metadata.
Pin systemd oneshot/transient actuator unit shape and naming.
Pin label lifecycle semantics (replace vs add/remove rules).
Define normalized signal.event schema and persistence location.

SS-013: plan/gate state schemas not yet defined
systemd oneshot/transient actuator unit shape/name not pinned
GitHub issue-label lifecycle semantics not pinned
normalized signal.event schema and persistence location not yet defined
SS-014: normalized signal.event schema not yet defined
signal persistence location not yet defined
systemd unit naming/template contract not yet defined
